name: OpenAI API
description: API access to GPT-4, DALL-E, Whisper, and embeddings. The most widely used LLM API for building AI applications.
whyUseIt: OpenAI's API is the fastest way to add powerful AI capabilities to any application. GPT-4 for text, DALL-E for images, Whisper for speech-to-text, and text-embedding-3 for semantic search.
